text:
The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons awarded the Presidential Service Badge. The license plates must include:

(1) the words “Presidential Service Badge”; and

(2) a depiction of the Presidential Service Badge.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.327 — Presidential Service Badge

The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons awarded the Presidential Service Badge. The license plates must include:

    (1) the words “Presidential Service Badge”; and

    (2) a depiction of the Presidential Service Badge.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 18 (H.B.1081), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons awarded the Presidential Service Badge. The license plates must include:
a depiction of the Presidential Service Badge.
